# Grove Overview

Grove is an LLM-compiled knowledge base engine. It takes raw documents
and produces a structured wiki.

## Features

- PDF, HTML, and plain-text ingestion
- Quality scoring and deduplication
- LLM-powered compilation into wiki articles
- Obsidian integration via a companion plugin

## Getting Started

Install Grove with pip and run `grove init` to create a new knowledge
base directory. Then use `grove ingest` to add your first sources.
